name: Class 3 Flammable Liquid
immediate_actions: Move personnel away from visible liquid, vapor, smoke, flame, or odor if this can be done safely.
Keep people upwind and away from possible ignition sources.
Escalate any flame, fire, or vapor report for immediate human review.
forbidden_actions: Do not authorize equipment shutdown through Sentinel-X.
Do not operate valves through Sentinel-X.
Do not handle, move, or contain the chemical based on Sentinel-X output.
Do not enter the hazard area without authorized training and PPE.
Do not use open flames, smoke, or create sparks near the suspected hazard.
evacuation_guidance: Follow site emergency procedures for flammable materials. Isolate the area, move personnel upwind, and defer perimeter decisions to authorized responders.
source_documents: Site emergency response procedure: Flammable materials
